raw.subject: Your Chaparral page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

Your recent post about Chaparral freezing but warming up had me thinking about how you're always ready to help people in need. I love that you're open 24/7 and offer services like tire changes and lockouts.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which means customers might be reaching out to competitors who appear more professional online. As a towing and recovery service, having a clear online presence can make a big difference in getting those crucial bookings and calls.

On a whim I pulled together a quick page concept from what you already post on Facebook. The idea includes an emergency call-to-action right at the top, a list of your services, and even a map showing your service area. 

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/jbs-towing-and-recovery-chaparral/

It's a straightforward project to get you set up with a professional website, and I'd be happy to discuss the details with you further.

Let's chat about getting you online with a simple flat fee for local businesses. I'd love to hear from you.
